description: PR6 — scenario/board aggregation. Multi-board scenario where the scenario-level stage_telemetry must equal the per-key sum of board-level stage_telemetry for the same run.

expected.invariant: scenario.stage_telemetry[key] == sum(board.stage_telemetry[key] for board in scenario.boards)

notes: Commit 7 wires this: scenario-level merge via merge_stage_telemetry across boards.
Not a per-board payload in PR6 — only a scenario-level one. Invariant still holds structurally because merge is associative.
